title: Ubiquiti mFi motion senzor (Ceiling mount)
category: Ubiquiti / IoT, SMART / Smart Home / Sensors
description: mFi is a Machine-to-Machine management system from Ubiquiti. mFi devices can be managed and monitored with mFi control software. This software allows you to create rules that switch based on data from mFi sensors. For example, the motion sensor may turn on the lights or the temperature sensor may turn on the fan. The mFi platform continues to be compatible with other similar devices, adding additional capabilities. Standard UTP cables are used to connect the sensors. You can use your IP network… RF immunity: 10V/m - 80MHz ~ 2GHz Warm time: 2 minuty Angle of view: 360° / 110° Interface: 1x RJ45 Mounting height: 4.5m
